23:26-23:35.caption: 23:26-23:35: the culvert opens onto the night field. The bluebonnets give off their own light.
23:26-23:35.wrongness: the missing minutes are seated; the shoulder is gone behind the flowers

hotspots.label: Follow the luminous flower path
hotspots.caption: The path accepts the jog wheel detent and pulls forward.

23:26-23:35.caption: 23:26-23:35: the flowers stand shoulder-high and lean away from a car you still cannot see moving.
23:26-23:35.wrongness: every bloom head tracks the unseen car instead of the camera

hotspots.label: Move toward the car lights
hotspots.caption: The car is nearer between frames, never during one.

23:26-23:35.caption: 23:26-23:35: the car is finally near. Its dark windshield reflects the cruiser dashboard instead of the sky.
23:26-23:35.wrongness: the distance collapsed without motion blur or engine sound

hotspots.label: Check the shrine beside the car
hotspots.caption: The shrine is fresh, wet, and older than the tape.

23:26-23:35.caption: 23:26-23:35: blank evidence tags hang from the shrine. The deck overlays only what the tape can prove.
23:26-23:35.wrongness: the offering is both memorial and warning

hotspots.label: Log the composited shrine warning

journal.text: NINE-MINUTE SHRINE: EJECT seals the tape. RECORD overwrites the evidence with you inside it.

hotspots.caption: NINE-MINUTE SHRINE: EJECT seals the tape. RECORD overwrites the evidence with you inside it.

hotspots.label: Approach the driver's door
hotspots.caption: The driver's door is open exactly as the cruiser was.

23:26-23:35.caption: 23:26-23:35: the driver's seat is empty. The dashcam reflection shows a hand reaching for the deck controls.
23:26-23:35.wrongness: the car and cruiser share the same empty interior

hotspots.label: Log the final dash reflection

journal.text: FINAL DASH REFLECTION: the evidence deck is visible inside the missing car. Choose EJECT or RECORD.

hotspots.caption: FINAL DASH REFLECTION: the evidence deck is visible inside the missing car. Choose EJECT or RECORD.

hotspots.label: Reach for the deck controls
hotspots.caption: The deck is waiting for the same two physical choices.

23:26-23:35.caption: 23:26-23:35: the tape has no more geography. Only the deck remains: EJECT to seal it, RECORD to overwrite it.
23:26-23:35.wrongness: the missing minutes wait for an ending choice

hotspots.label: EJECT — seal the tape

journal.text: ENDING CHOICE ARMED: EJECT will seal the tape with the missing minutes contained.

hotspots.caption: ENDING CHOICE ARMED: EJECT will seal the tape with the missing minutes contained.

hotspots.label: RECORD — overwrite the evidence

journal.text: ENDING CHOICE ARMED: RECORD will overwrite the evidence with the viewer inside the tape.

hotspots.caption: ENDING CHOICE ARMED: RECORD will overwrite the evidence with the viewer inside the tape.
